pattern: Instead of just -ing, I really want to...
usage_today: Let me tell you a bit about myself, but instead of just reading off my resume, I really want to share who I am as a person these days.
extra_example: Instead of just staying home, I really want to go out and enjoy the sunny weather today.

pattern: I make it a point to...
usage_today: To balance work and life, I make it a point to hit the gym at least three times a week.
extra_example: I make it a point to call my parents once a week no matter how busy I am.

pattern: I was desperate to [verb], so I decided to...
usage_today: I was feeling incredibly burnt out and desperate to escape the daily grind, so I decided to head out to a local historic neighborhood without any concrete plans.
extra_example: I was desperate to clear my head, so I decided to go for a drive late at night.

usage_today: It made me realize that the best memories are often the unexpected ones.
extra_example: Living alone made me realize that doing chores takes a lot of time and effort.

usage_today: Honestly, everything was perfect until my plans came to a screeching halt.
extra_example: Everything was perfect until I realized I had left my passport at home.

usage_today: Looking back, that breakdown was actually a blessing in disguise.
extra_example: Looking back, failing that interview was actually a great opportunity to redirect my career.

pattern: To be completely honest with you, [clause]
usage_today: To be completely honest with you, I used to be someone who was constantly glued to the screen, you know?
extra_example: To be completely honest with you, I didn't like the food at that restaurant at first.

usage_today: It really hit me that I didn't need to be online 24/7.
extra_example: It really hit me that life is too short to worry about small things.

pattern: Back in [time period], I used to [verb], but fast forward to today, [clause].
usage_today: Back in high school, I used to buy physical formats, but fast forward to today, everything has completely shifted to digital streaming platforms.
extra_example: Back in college, I used to work out at the outdoor park, but fast forward to today, I prefer hitting a local indoor gym.
topic: 과거 vs 현재 비교 문장 만들기

usage_today: What's even cooler is that personalized recommendations help me discover brand-new music effortlessly.
extra_example: What's even cooler is that the app membership offers unlimited access to audiobooks as well.
topic: 과거 vs 현재 비교 문장 만들기

pattern: If I had to pick my absolute favorite [noun], it would definitely be...
meaning: 제가 가장 좋아하는 [명사]를 단 하나 골라야 한다면, 단연 ~일 것입니다.
usage_today: If I had to pick my absolute favorite spot, it would definitely be my living room.
extra_example: If I had to pick my absolute favorite dish, it would definitely be my mother's home-cooked pasta.

pattern: Taking the time to [verb] has been immensely satisfying.
meaning: 시간과 노력을 들여 ~한 것은 매우 만족스러운 경험이었습니다.
usage_today: But taking the time to turn it into a space that feels cozy and inviting has been immensely satisfying.
extra_example: Taking the time to organize my daily schedule and workspace has been immensely satisfying.
